name: Rhino 3D
cap: Industry-standard NURBS + mesh modeling platform. Primary hub for AI plugin ecosystem — Grasshopper, Veras, Enscape, V-Ray, D5 Render, and KeyShot all plug directly in. Widely used in architecture studios, industrial design, and HDL anthropometry research at CDes.

name: Grasshopper
cap: Visual algorithmic design environment built into Rhino. Connects to ML models via the Hops component; used for generative facade studies, structural optimization, parametric planting layouts, and ergonomic form iteration. Foundation for computational design workflows at CDes.

name: Veras
cap: Only AI renderer that works as a native plugin inside 7 BIM/CAD platforms simultaneously: Rhino, Revit, SketchUp, Archicad, Vectorworks, Autodesk Forma, and AllPlan. Geometry Override slider lets designers control how much AI modifies vs preserves underlying geometry. 44% of architects now use AI for concept images.

name: Enscape
cap: Real-time rendering and VR walkthrough plugin running live inside Rhino, Revit, SketchUp, Archicad, and Vectorworks. AI denoising accelerates render quality. One-click VR for client presentations. Standard client presentation tool in architecture and interior design studios.

name: V-Ray for Rhino
cap: Professional rendering plugin for Rhino with GPU-accelerated ray tracing, advanced material library, and AI denoising. Produces studio-quality stills and animations directly from Rhino models. Used for award submissions, publications, and high-end client deliverables.

name: Ladybug Tools
cap: Environmental analysis plugin suite for Grasshopper: Ladybug (climate data viz), Honeybee (energy + daylight simulation), Butterfly (CFD), Dragonfly (urban heat island). Brings climate performance feedback into the design loop early. Increasingly paired with ML for optimization.

name: Autodesk Forma
cap: AI-driven early-stage site and massing platform. Analyzes solar exposure, wind, noise, microclimate, density, and ecological performance in seconds vs hours with traditional tools. Native integration with Revit (Forma Connected Clients), ArcGIS GIS data layers, and Rhino. Formerly Spacemaker.

name: TestFit
cap: Generative building feasibility tool. Automatically generates code-compliant building layouts, unit mixes, parking counts, and pro forma data from a site outline in real time. Converts site analysis into hard development numbers in minutes. Standard in multifamily and mixed-use pre-design.

name: Snaptrude
cap: Browser-based AI BIM platform. AI agents generate zoning-compliant building program, massing, and full BIM model from an RFP document upload. Exports to Revit with parameters and families intact. Closes the gap between early-stage concepting and documentation-ready BIM.

name: D5 Render
cap: Real-time rendering platform with three distinct AI features: AI Material Generator (photo → production-ready PBR texture), AI Atmosphere Match (relight scenes to match reference photo), and AI Scatter (intelligent vegetation placement from a single plant). Plugins connect Rhino, Revit, SketchUp, Vectorworks.

name: LookX
cap: AI rendering platform purpose-built for interior design and architecture. Two modes: Content Mode (AI generates and places furniture/materials into geometry) and Composition Mode (AI respects exact geometry, replaces only materials/lighting). Native plugins for SketchUp and Rhino 3D.

name: Planner 5D
cap: AI-assisted space planning tool. AI floor plan recognition reads a hand-drawn or photo sketch and generates a 3D model. Design Generator creates style variants (modern, Scandinavian, industrial) from a single layout. Accessible for clients to co-design without technical background.

name: ArcGIS Pro
cap: Industry-standard GIS platform with AI-assisted spatial analysis, environmental modeling, land-use studies, and 3D city planning. Native integration with Autodesk Forma (ArcGIS for Autodesk Forma, launched June 2025) enables GIS layers to flow directly into Revit via Forma. ML tools for pattern recognition in spatial datasets.

name: Vectorworks Landmark
cap: Leading landscape BIM authoring tool. Integrates GIS, drone survey, point cloud, and field data directly into the BIM model with real-time linked updates. Site model automatically reflects design changes. Standard for large-scale landscape and planning projects. Connects with Esri ArcGIS and exports to IFC.

name: Midjourney
cap: Highest artistic quality text-to-image AI. v7 (April 2025) added character consistency via cref tag, enabling campaign and narrative visual coherence. Standard mood board and concept imagery tool across all CDes design disciplines. Commercial use requires paid subscription. Discord and browser interface.

name: Adobe Firefly
cap: Commercially safe generative AI trained exclusively on licensed Adobe Stock and public domain content. Embedded in Photoshop (Generative Fill, Generative Expand), Illustrator (text-to-vector, Generative Recolor), and InDesign. Adobe provides IP indemnification for commercial use — critical distinction from Midjourney. CC Standard plan $54.99/mo as of Feb 2026.

name: Adobe Illustrator AI
cap: Firefly integrated directly into Illustrator's native interface. Key AI features: text-to-vector (generates editable SVG paths from prompts), Generative Recolor (recolors artwork across multiple variants instantly), AI font matching, and enhanced Magic Wand selection. Safest commercial vector AI workflow — same indemnification as Firefly.

name: DALL-E 3
cap: Text-to-image generation integrated natively inside ChatGPT. Strong prompt adherence and conversational iteration — you can refine images through dialogue. Lower artistic ceiling than Midjourney but faster iteration cycles. Useful for quick concept passes and client rough communication. Gpt-image-1 API available for developers.

name: Stable Diffusion
cap: Open-source image generation model at version 3.5 (2025). Runs locally on compatible GPU hardware — enables brand-trained custom model fine-tuning with LoRA adapters for consistent visual output. No cloud subscription; maximum customization and privacy. Requires technical setup. Community models available on Civitai and HuggingFace.

name: Recraft
cap: Only AI image tool that generates native SVG vector output from text prompts. Creates icons, logos, spot illustrations, and UI graphics as fully editable vectors — no manual tracing required. Style guide feature locks palette and visual language for brand consistency. Exports directly to Illustrator-compatible SVG.

name: Canva Magic Studio
cap: Suite of AI features inside Canva: Magic Design (text-to-branded-layout), Magic Animate (auto-animated social content), Magic Layers (converts flat photo into editable layer stack — March 2026), Brand Kit auto-apply. 43% business adoption in 2026. Fastest workflow for marketing assets, social content, lookbooks, and presentation decks.

name: Claude
cap: Cross-disciplinary AI assistant covering the full design process written layer: literature synthesis, design briefs, task analysis, regulatory writing, code generation, design narratives, presentation scripts, and grant writing. CDes three-database NotebookLM methodology developed and validated at CDes. Strong for HFE research, sustainability reporting, and strategic communications.

name: NotebookLM
cap: Document-grounded AI research tool. Grounds all responses in uploaded sources — PDFs, Google Docs, websites, YouTube transcripts. Cannot hallucinate facts not in your documents. CDes three-database methodology (developed by Milo Tacheny): three simultaneous notebooks for literature, standards, and case studies, cross-referenced via Claude. Audio Overview feature creates podcast-style summaries.

name: Perplexity
cap: AI search engine that cites every claim with live web sources. Best for current tool releases, standards updates, competitive research, and finding recent publications. Complements NotebookLM (which works from uploaded docs) by covering the live web. Pro plan adds access to GPT-4o, Claude, and image generation.

name: Miro AI
cap: AI layer added to Miro's infinite canvas. AI Assist: clusters sticky notes into affinity themes automatically, generates journey maps and diagrams from text, synthesizes workshop output into structured summaries. Standard tool for design sprints, HFE research affinity mapping, and cross-functional team workshops. AI features added 2024-25.

name: Gamma
cap: AI presentation and document builder. Generate a structured deck from a text outline in under 60 seconds. Live web publishing, interactive embeds, and real-time analytics on viewer engagement. Faster than PowerPoint for stakeholder communication; less brand control than Canva. Used for trend presentations, assortment reviews, and design competition submissions.

name: Figma AI
cap: Figma has evolved from a design tool into an AI-assisted product design ecosystem (LogRocket, April 2026). 2026 AI feature set: First Draft (UI from text), Replace Content (AI fills with realistic copy), Make an Image, Add Interactions, Check Designs (accessibility linter), Figma Make (prompt-to-functional-prototype with code), MCP server (Claude writes directly to Figma files), Dev Mode (AI-generated code specs). 78% of designers report AI boosts work efficiency (Figma 2025 AI report).

name: Uizard
cap: AI-first wireframing tool. Four entry points: sketch photo to wireframe, screenshot to editable design, text prompt to UI, or whiteboard photo to screens. AI design chatbot iterates on designs conversationally. Not production-ready but strong for concept validation and stakeholder alignment before moving to Figma.

name: Google Stitch
cap: Relaunched March 2026 with infinite canvas and context-aware AI agents. Input modes: text, image upload, sketch, or voice. AI agents generate complete multi-screen user journeys, not just single screens. Exports to Figma with layers and components intact. DESIGN.md format documents design decisions. 350 standard generations/month free.

name: v0 by Vercel
cap: Generates functional React UI components and full page layouts from text prompts. Output is production-quality code using Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui component library. Bridges design and development handoff — UX designers can generate working prototypes without engineering support. Iterates via conversational prompts.

name: Dovetail
cap: AI-powered qualitative research repository. Auto-transcribes user interviews and usability sessions, then AI identifies themes, sentiment, and key quotes across the full dataset. Magic Tags auto-code transcripts. Research repository stores and connects insights across studies over time. Reduces manual analysis time by 20-30%. Standard for UX and HFE research teams.

name: Maze
cap: Unmoderated usability testing platform connecting directly to Figma prototypes. Measures task success rate, time-on-task, misclick rate, and satisfaction. AI thematic clustering analyzes open-ended responses at scale. Automated research reports with statistical significance indicators. Future of UX Research 2026: research now informs all enterprise strategy levels.

name: UserTesting
cap: Enterprise user research platform combining a large screened participant panel (50+ demographic filters) with AI analysis. AI sentiment analysis and key theme highlighting cuts video review time by ~60%. Session recording, click tracking, and heatmaps. Pricing reflects enterprise scale — typically $15K-$50K/yr. Used for studies requiring specific demographic targets.

name: Vizcom
cap: Purpose-built AI sketch-to-render tool for industrial and product design. Converts hand sketches or rough digital drawings into photorealistic product renders in real time. Region masking controls which areas AI modifies. USDZ export enables AR product review on iPhone/iPad. Strongest dedicated tool for industrial design concept visualization. Used at major product studios.

name: Fusion 360
cap: Cloud-native 3D CAD/CAM/CAE platform with generative design built in. Generative design takes user-defined constraints (loads, materials, manufacturing method) and generates multiple optimized geometry solutions simultaneously — critical for additive manufacturing. AI AutoConstrain automatically applies sketch constraints. Integrated simulation and CNC toolpath generation.

name: SolidWorks
cap: Industry-standard parametric 3D CAD for mechanical and industrial design. AURA AI assistant (2025) offers contextual feature suggestions, executes voice commands, and learns from individual user habits to speed modeling. AI-powered assembly suggestions and photo-to-feature recognition. Standard for precision mechanical parts and engineering documentation.

name: Gravity Sketch
cap: VR/AR 3D design tool built for physical form exploration. Sketch, sculpt, and surface directly in immersive 3D space. AI curve smoothing and surface continuity tools. Widely used in footwear design (Nike, Adidas), automotive, and consumer product studios to bridge the gap between sketching and CAD. Exports to Rhino, Fusion 360, and SolidWorks.

name: nTop
cap: Computational engineering platform for complex geometry that traditional CAD cannot model. Implicit modeling creates lattice structures, heat exchangers, and topology-optimized parts for additive manufacturing. Field-driven design links geometry to simulation data. Standard for performance footwear, aerospace brackets, and medical implants. Connects to Fusion 360 and SolidWorks via data exchange.

name: KeyShot
cap: Industry-standard photorealistic product rendering. GPU-accelerated real-time ray tracing with AI denoising. Deep material library with physically accurate fabrics, metals, plastics, and glass. Native plugins for Rhino, SolidWorks, Fusion 360, CATIA, and 15+ other CAD platforms. Standard for product launch imagery, patent illustrations, and marketing photography.

name: Prome AI
cap: AI rendering platform that takes sketches or 3D model screenshots as input and generates photorealistic product or space images. Material swapping, scene control, and lighting variation tools. Strong complement to Vizcom for product design; also used in architecture alongside Veras and D5 Render. Batch rendering for multiple variants.

name: CLO 3D
cap: Industry-standard 3D garment simulation platform. Physics-based engine accurately renders drape, fold, and movement for silk, denim, knitwear, and performance fabrics. AI curve tools and symmetric design tools for pattern creation. CLO-SET CONNECT cloud asset management and CLO-Vise PLM plugin for enterprise data exchange. AI FitModel customization enables made-to-measure workflows. Relevant to HDL anthropometry research for body scan integration.
pricing: Paid ($50/mo Individual, enterprise pricing for studios)

name: Marvelous Designer
cap: 3D garment creation tool made by CLO Virtual Fashion, focused on game and VFX character clothing rather than production pattern making. 2026.0 adds 3D Pencil (draw patterns directly on 3D avatar), Lacing Tool, and EveryWear Rig Templates for game-ready clothing. Exports Alembic, FBX, USD, OBJ. Used by entertainment studios alongside CLO for fashion brands.

name: Optitex
cap: Technical pattern making and grading platform with AI fit prediction. Stronger on production-grade pattern work than CLO 3D — the engineering complement to CLO's design focus. AI grading scales patterns across size runs while maintaining fit intent. Used by brands integrating into Gerber AccuMark and Lectra PLM systems.

name: Browzwear
cap: 3D digital product creation platform focused on supply chain integration. Batch digital product image generation reduces photography costs. Virtual sampling pipeline integrates with PLM systems and Joor digital wholesale. Digital twin tracks garment through development and production. Strong for high-SKU brands and retailers needing scalable digital asset production.

name: Style3D
cap: Fastest-growing 3D fashion design platform in 2026. AI-native from ground up: sketch-to-3D-design pipeline, AI template library, cloud rendering for marketing imagery. Strongest on automation depth and template richness among 3D fashion tools. Used by Chinese fast fashion and emerging DTC brands. Expanding Western market presence in 2025-26.

name: Heuritech
cap: AI trend forecasting platform using computer vision + social media signal extraction. Scans millions of images daily to detect early adoption of colors, prints, silhouettes, and materials before they peak in mainstream retail. Provides quantified trend signals 12-18 months ahead. Used by Coach, Adidas, and major European luxury houses for collection planning.

name: WGSN
cap: Industry-standard trend forecasting and consumer intelligence platform. AI deepened significantly in 2024-25: AI-enhanced trend signal detection, Mindset consumer segmentation, and seasonal color + material direction. Used by design teams to validate collection direction and timing. WGSN Barometer tracks trend adoption lifecycle from emergence to mass market.

name: WGSN Insight
cap: WGSN's retail-specific consumer intelligence product. AI demand forecasting signals extracted from social, search, and sales data to inform assortment planning, buying decisions, and inventory depth. Retail-focused extension of WGSN's broader trend platform. Used by buying teams at department stores and specialty retailers.

name: Joor AI
cap: AI tools added to Joor's digital wholesale platform in 2024-25. AI-driven inventory optimization suggests reorder quantities, identifies slow movers, and surfaces demand signals from digital buying session data. Major platform for brand-to-retailer wholesale — $1.5B in GMV processed annually. AI buying recommendations reduce overstock and understock decisions.

name: Perch Interactive
cap: AI-triggered physical retail display system. Pressure sensors detect when a customer picks up a product from a shelf or display surface and immediately trigger relevant digital content on a nearby screen — product story, ingredients, comparisons, how-to videos. Used in beauty, grocery, and electronics retail. Emerging experiential design tool for retail merchandising students.

name: CATIA Ergonomics
cap: Digital human modeling suite integrated with CATIA and SolidWorks. AI-assisted posture prediction evaluates reach zones, visibility cones, and joint loads without manual manikin placement. Industry standard for automotive (cabin design), aerospace (cockpit), and medical device HFE analysis. Relevant for CDes HFE students applying ergonomic methods to product and workplace design.

name: AI Posture Analysis Tools
cap: Emerging category: computer vision tools that score REBA and RULA ergonomic risk from standard video footage, replacing manual observation and angle measurement. ErgoPlus AI, KINEBOT, and OpenPose-based tools analyze video frames and output automated MSD risk classifications. Reduces assessment time from hours to minutes. Used in industrial ergonomics, healthcare, and CDes HFE research.
pricing: Varies (some free/open source, enterprise pricing for ErgoPlus)
